theme_tagline: Score Big. Win Gold. Lady E Luck x World Cup 2026.
primary_hook: FIFA World Cup 2026 — Round of 32 match day (Argentina vs Cape Verde 6PM, Colombia vs Ghana 9:30PM, hosted on US soil)
secondary_hook: 4th of July Eve — America's 250th Birthday Weekend + Fortune Friday energy
trending_topic_details: World Cup 2026 is dominating all platforms. Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' anthem has 5.3M+ TikTok posts. Today's marquee match is Argentina vs Cape Verde at 6PM ET in Miami. Colombia vs Ghana at 9:30PM ET. World Cup is hosted in USA/Canada/Mexico — making it especially resonant on 4th of July Eve weekend. Lady E Luck's emerald green palette perfectly mirrors soccer pitch green.
special_day_details: July 3, 2026 is Independence Day (Observed) — federal holiday since July 4 falls on Saturday. America's 250th birthday weekend. Party energy is at peak across the country. Everyone is celebrating tonight.
content_angle: Lady E Luck is THE home court for winners this World Cup weekend — every spin is a goal, every bonus is a golden boot, and tonight's biggest jackpot drops at the final whistle.
deals_hook: Golden Boot Jackpot (all day) — biggest recharge wins a multiplier bonus
Hat Trick Bonus (3PM–6PM) — 3 recharges during match hours = stacked bonus
Penalty Kick Free Spin (referral) — share code, friend joins = both get free spin bonus
Halftime Reload (10PM–Midnight) — mystery midnight drop for active players
